name: Ars Cafe
tagline: Art gallery meets gelato shop meets espresso bar — a charming post-Diamond Head pit stop with homemade Italian gelato.
mustOrder: Homemade gelato — rotating tropical flavors like lilikoi and haupia
parking: Street parking on Monsarrat Ave. Can be tight on weekends
talkStory: Run by a Japanese-Italian couple who make authentic gelato in-house daily using local tropical fruits like lilikoi, guava, and haupia coconut. The espresso is pulled on a proper Italian machine, and the affogato — a shot of espresso poured over their homemade gelato — is the best post-Diamond Head hike reward on the island. The rotating art on the walls is from local Honolulu artists and actually for sale. Monsarrat Ave locals treat this as their secret neighborhood gem.
